5.1) Daily number of page views of EMODnet Thematic entry page

5.2) Total number of visitors, page views, unique page views and percentage of returning visitors, since start of contract
Explanation of the trends and statistics
5.2) Total number of visitors, page views, unique page views and percentage of returning visitors, since the start of the contract
Unnamed: 1: The number of visitors remained stable overall, though page views declined. The % of returning visitors shows the most marked decline. Again, this might be consistent with the fact that more and more users are using web services to consume human activities. To be more precise, it is possible that in the past users used to visit the EMODnet Human Activities thematic page and then access the map viewer or products catalogue from there, whereas now they have become accustomed to using webservices, thus bypassing the thematic page. However, it should be noted that there is no evidence of this trend, and thus this explanation may be plausible, but it remains unconfirmed. data
